# meraki_organization_sase_networks_elegible (Data Source)

This data source can read the `Organization Sase Networks Elegible` configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "meraki_organization_sase_networks_elegible" "example" {
  organization_id = "123456"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object
- `items` (Attributes List) List of enrollable networks (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))
- `meta_counts_items_remaining` (Number) The number of items in the dataset that are available on subsequent pages
- `meta_counts_items_total` (Number) The total number of items in the dataset

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `address_street` (String) The street address of the site
- `device_primary_model` (String) Model of the primary MX device
- `name` (String) Site name
- `network_id` (String) Network ID, may not be unique in result set
- `region_name` (String) The name of the region
- `routing_default_route_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the site has default route enabled
- `type` (String) The site`s type (one of: `Meraki spoke`, `Meraki hub`, `Meraki template`)
- `vpn_type` (String) The VPN type of the site
